summary: Iteration 42 - Comprehensive testing of Pub IA features (Images IA + Vidéos IA). All core features working correctly including navigation dropdown, Media Pub page, Video Pub page, Enterprise dashboard Commandes Titelli tab, Admin dashboard Pub Média IA tab, and Stripe payment integration.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pub IA features (Images + Videos) are fully functional. Navigation dropdown 'Pub IA' works with both 'Images IA' and 'Vidéos IA' options. Enterprise dashboard shows orders in 'Commandes Titelli' tab with tabs for filtering (Toutes/Images/Vidéos). Admin dashboard has 'Pub Média IA' tab with stats and order management. Stripe payment sessions are created successfully for both media and video orders. All 35 homepage images load correctly with no broken images.

navigation.pub_ia_dropdown: ✅ Working - Shows 'Images IA' and 'Vidéos IA' options

media_pub_page.template_selection: ✅ Click on template opens customization view
media_pub_page.form_inputs: ✅ Slogan, product name, colors all working
media_pub_page.payment_button: ✅ Proceed to payment button visible and enabled

video_pub_page.form_inputs: ✅ Product name, slogan, style inputs working

enterprise_dashboard.commandes_titelli_tab: ✅ Shows all orders (7 total: 6 images, 1 video)
enterprise_dashboard.stats_cards: ✅ Total, En cours, Terminées, Total dépensé displayed
enterprise_dashboard.order_cards: ✅ Both image and video orders displayed with details

admin_dashboard.stats: ✅ Shows 14 total, 12 completed, 408.80 CHF revenue, 2 failed
admin_dashboard.order_table: ✅ Full order table with ID, Template, Enterprise, Prix, Statut, etc.

api_tests_summary.failure_reason: Minor test issue - frontend HTML check (React renders content dynamically, not in initial HTML)
